judgeScores.justification: The organizational structure demonstrates excellent domain expertise through the architectural layering of code (frontend/backend/data-science/scripts) and the temporal-functional hybrid sorting of photos (by year for personal, by purpose for work assets). All 80 files are accounted for with zero remaining in root, utilizing consistent kebab-case naming and ideal 2-3 level nesting, while the MANIFEST provides clear documentation of the 'type-first, topic-second' logic. The only minor quibble is that package_old.json might more appropriately reside in archives/ given its deprecated status, though its placement in config/ is defensible.
